name: prism-app
description: PRISM open-source desktop shell and web UI

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev -w ui" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev -w desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w ui && npm run build -w desktop
scripts.build:electron: cross-env VITE_ELECTRON=1 npm run build -w ui && npm run build -w desktop
scripts.dist: npm run build:electron && npm run dist:only
scripts.dist:only: npm run rebuild:native && node scripts/copy-main-deps.mjs && node scripts/verify-native-deps.mjs && node scripts/copy-rtk-binaries.mjs && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish: npm run build:electron && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
